product: L-Acoustics K3i (installation version of the K3 variable curvature line source loudspeaker)

electroacoustic.directivity: Horizontal: Panflex-adjustable 70 deg / 110 deg symmetric or 90 deg asymmetric; Vertical: dependent on number of elements and array curvature
electroacoustic.components: LF: 2 x 12 in neodymium cone drivers (bass-reflex, L-Vents); HF: 1 x 4 in neodymium diaphragm compression driver on DOSC waveguide with Panflex

connection.input_connector: 2x 4-point terminal blocks with push-in connection (1+/1- = LF, 2+/2- = HF)
connection.field_wiring: 4 x 2.5 mm2 or 2 x 2.5 mm2 bare-wire speaker cable, or a custom 4-point speakON (NL4) to bare-wire cable; connector sealing plate with cable gland for weather sealing

physical.dimensions_mm: 907 W x 357 H x 429 D (front face 357 H tapering to 287 H; depth 403 to 429)
physical.cabinet: Premium-grade Baltic birch plywood with coated steel grille and acoustically neutral 3D fabric; high-grade steel rigging with anti-corrosion coating
physical.finish: Dark grey brown Pantone 426 C, Pure white RAL 9010, or custom RAL on special order

deployment.max_per_flown_array: Up to 16 K3i flown (with K3i-RIGBAR as main lifting accessory)
rigging_accessories: K3i-ENDLINK (end rigging plate, required on top enclosure)
KARAIIi-DOWNK3i (interface for flying Kara IIi below K3i)
M6 inserts for rigging plates and accessories

usage: Long-throw line source for medium-to-large permanent installs such as concert halls, clubs, congress centers and sport venues; delivers K2-class output in a compact, lighter cabinet with installation-friendly mounting hardware.

Uses one amplifier channel per box (LF and HF bridged off one channel via terminal-block wiring), so plan amp capacity around max enclosures per controller: 6 on an LA12X, 8 on an LA7.16(i), or 2 on an LA4X.

Pick the horizontal-coverage preset to match the room: [K3 70] for tight long throw, [K3 110] for wide near-field, or [K3 90] for asymmetric audience geometry; combine settings within a single hang to follow seating shape.
Pair with KS28 or KS21i subwoofers and the matching [xxxx_60] crossover presets to extend low-end down to roughly 25 Hz, keeping the K3i mains on their reference 42 Hz - 20 kHz response.
Vertical splay is set with K3i-LINK plates from 0.25 deg up to 10 deg; flown arrays can run up to 16 enclosures using K3i-RIGBAR, with K3i-ENDLINK mandatory on the top box.

IP55-rated and color-matchable out of the box, making it suited to weather-exposed outdoor positions and architecturally sensitive indoor installs; always validate array size and rigging loads in Soundvision before deployment.
